narrative:
Cardington Village E (precinct in Morrow County) has 671 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.8 percentage points.
